summary: The South Bay closed out March with a funding blitz: over $4.5 billion flowed into local AI, robotics, and infrastructure startups, with Nexthop AI (Santa Clara), MatX (Mountain View), and Ayar Labs (San Jose) each landing half-billion-dollar rounds. Most of the region's tech workforce remains stable, though seven companies are actively hiring while two are trimming headcount. Two local events this week explore AI tools and tech careers—a timely backdrop as the funding surge signals investor confidence in South Bay innovation.
